tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: Do you fancy going to the cinema on Saturday?
Y: _________
options: A) Yes, I'd love to. What's on?
B) Yes, I have been there yesterday.
C) No, I'm not going since two days.

items.stem:
X: Let's meet at the park at three o'clock.
Y: _________
options: A) Sorry, the park is very green in summer.
B) That works for me. See you there.
C) Yes, I am meeting at three since morning.

items.stem:
X: I can't come tonight, I'm afraid.
Y: _________
options: A) Never mind. Maybe another time?
B) Yes, please, you can come tonight.
C) No, thanks, I don't can come either.

items.stem:
X: How about meeting up after school?
Y: _________
options: A) I have met up the school yesterday.
B) The school is after the meeting, isn't it?
C) Good idea. Shall we go to the cafe?

items.stem:
X: Shall we invite Tom to the party too?
Y: _________
options: A) Of course, the more the merrier!
B) Of course, he is the party last week.
C) Of course, we shall to invite him.

items.stem:
X: What time should we set off tomorrow?
Y: _________
options: A) Let's leave around nine, before it gets too hot.
B) Yes, the time is setting off very quickly.
C) Tomorrow we are setting off the clock at nine.
